title: gymnanthemum mespilifolium
intro: Gymnanthemum mespilifolium, also known as the wood betony or wood balm, is a plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Gymnanthemum mespilifolium include reducing inflammation, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. It is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas, tinctures, and salves, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
